---
title: "Synthetic Disk Simulation"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

<style>
.simulacion-layout {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 355px 1fr;
  gap: 1rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
  align-items: start;
}

.panel-controles,
.panel-visual {
  padding: 1rem;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.65);
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18);
  box-shadow: 0 10px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.20);
}

.panel-controles {
  position: sticky;
  top: 1rem;
}

#lienzo-disco {
  width: min(100%, 920px);
  height: auto;
  aspect-ratio: 920 / 590;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
  border-radius: 14px;
  display: block;
  background: #000;
}

#lienzo-perfiles {
  width: min(100%, 920px);
  height: auto;
  aspect-ratio: 920 / 300;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
  border-radius: 14px;
  display: block;
  background: #000;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}

#resumen-parametros {
  margin-top: 1rem;
  padding: 0.85rem;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
  border-radius: 12px;
}

.control-grupo {
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.control-grupo label {
  display: block;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
}

.control-grupo input[type="range"] {
  width: 100%;
}

.bloque-opciones {
  margin-top: 1rem;
  padding-top: 1rem;
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
}

.opcion-check {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
}

.selector-preset,
.selector-asimetria {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 0.60rem 0.70rem;
  border-radius: 10px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  color: white;
  margin-top: 0.35rem;
}

.selector-preset option,
.selector-asimetria option {
  color: black;
}

.boton-reset {
  margin-top: 0.75rem;
  width: 100%;
  padding: 0.75rem 0.9rem;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.60);
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  color: white;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.boton-reset:hover {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.16);
}

.texto-ayuda {
  margin-top: 0.75rem;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  line-height: 1.45;
}

.texto-nota {
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  opacity: 0.92;
  line-height: 1.45;
}

.subtitulo-bloque {
  margin-top: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 1rem;
}

@media (max-width: 980px) {
  .simulacion-layout {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .panel-controles {
    position: static;
  }
}
</style>

## Protoplanetary Disk Simulation

This interactive tool shows how changing physical parameters modifies the morphology of a synthetic protoplanetary disk.

::: {.simulacion-layout}

::: {.panel-controles}
### Controls

<div id="contenedor-controles"></div>

<div class="bloque-opciones">
  <h4>Presets</h4>
  <label for="selector-preset">Quick examples</label>
  <select id="selector-preset" class="selector-preset">
    <option value="base">Base model</option>
    <option value="weak-gap">Weak gap</option>
    <option value="strong-trap">Strong trapping</option>
    <option value="two-planets-eccentric">Two planets + eccentricity</option>
    <option value="two-planets-vortex">Two planets + vortex-like clump</option>
  </select>
</div>

<div class="bloque-opciones">
  <h4>Layers</h4>

  <label class="opcion-check">
    <input type="checkbox" id="toggle-gas" checked>
    <span>Show gas</span>
  </label>

  <label class="opcion-check">
    <input type="checkbox" id="toggle-polvo-fino" checked>
    <span>Show small dust</span>
  </label>

  <label class="opcion-check">
    <input type="checkbox" id="toggle-polvo-mm" checked>
    <span>Show mm dust</span>
  </label>

  <label class="opcion-check">
    <input type="checkbox" id="toggle-planeta" checked>
    <span>Show planet(s)</span>
  </label>

  <label class="opcion-check">
    <input type="checkbox" id="toggle-etiquetas" checked>
    <span>Show labels</span>
  </label>

  <label class="opcion-check">
    <input type="checkbox" id="toggle-presion" checked>
    <span>Show pressure profile</span>
  </label>

  <button id="boton-reset" class="boton-reset">Reset model</button>

  <p class="texto-ayuda">
    The radial plot compares the normalized distributions of gas, small dust, millimeter dust, and a pressure proxy.
  </p>

  <p class="texto-nota">
    This simulator is pedagogical: it combines simplified versions of planet–disk interaction, dust trapping, and filtering to show how substructures respond to physically motivated parameters.
  </p>

  <p class="texto-nota">
    Azimuthal asymmetries, such as eccentric rings or vortex-like clumps, may be much clearer in the disk image than in the radial plot, because the radial profiles are azimuthally averaged.
  </p>
</div>
:::

::: {.panel-visual}
### Disk view

<canvas id="lienzo-disco" width="920" height="590"></canvas>

### Radial profiles

<canvas id="lienzo-perfiles" width="920" height="300"></canvas>

<div id="resumen-parametros">
  <strong>Current model:</strong>
  <p id="texto-parametros">Loading simulation parameters...</p>
</div>
:::

:::

<script src="simulation.js?v=3"></script>
